name: AIR-DROW Critical Input & Export Recovery Edition
delivery: This complete final source package is ready for npm ci and npm run vercel:build. node_modules and public are intentionally excluded because the production output is regenerated from package-lock.json and web during build.
iconReplacement: The complete local icon package remains installed. Scanner status marks use resilient inline vectors for Android, while the editable local icon package remains available for future artwork replacement.
releaseName: AIR-DROW Critical Input & Export Recovery Edition
summary: A stability-focused release: physical-tap-only downloads, visible-artwork raster export recovery, safer hand controls, and polished Kurdish mobile typography.
releaseChecks: Version, cache and build identifiers are synchronized across source, manifest and service worker.
Hand gestures never dispatch save or export actions; two raised fingers remain a guarded eraser toggle only.
PNG, JPG and WebP use a protected artwork-only canvas snapshot so drawn strokes are present in the exported file.
Toolbar, palette, workspace and settings remain explicit protected input surfaces; Kurdish mobile typography has dedicated RTL size tokens.
